title: podman machine start reports an error although it starts, volumes not mounted to machine
body:
### Issue Description

There a are two issues that might be related:
* `podman machine start` logs `Error: machine did not transition into running state` although I can ssh to the machine and I can run containers just fine,
* after createing the machine with `-v $HOME:$HOME` the volume is not actually mounted, checked on machine via ssh. This causes `Error: statfs ... no such file or directory` issues.


### Steps to reproduce the issue

❯ podman version
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.6.2
API Version:  4.6.2
Go Version:   go1.21.0
Git Commit:   5db42e86862ef42c59304c38aa583732fd80f178
Built:        Mon Aug 28 16:55:03 2023
OS/Arch:      darwin/arm64

Server:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.6.2
API Version:  4.6.2
Go Version:   go1.20.7
Built:        Tue Sep 12 22:07:26 2023
OS/Arch:      linux/arm64

### Describe the results you received

False positive error when starting a machine.
Volumes not mounted to the machine.


### Describe the results you expected

I expect machine to start without errors with volumes mounted as specified via cli `machine init` flags.

### podman info output


### Privileged Or Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

No

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

Additional information like issue happens only occasionally or issue happens with a particular architecture or on a particular setting

comments.body: I'm having the same issue with podman version 4.6.2. The workaround suggested in [https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/17403#issuecomment-1536636874] isn't working anymore.

any chance this is on a rasp pi or something that has really slow io?  more information would be helpful.  also maybe include the start with `--log-level=debug`.  And maybe check for any running gvproxy processes prior ?

I started hitting the same problem on macOS Ventura 13.4.1 with podman 4.6.2: ``` podman version Client: Podman Engine Version: 4.6.2 API Version: 4.6.2 Go Version: go1.21.0 Git Commit: 5db42e86862ef42c59304c38aa583732fd80f178 Built: Mon Aug 28 10:55:03 2023 OS/Arch: darwin/arm64 Server: Podman Engine Version: 4.6.2 API Version: 4.6.2 Go Version: go1.21.0 Built: Tue Sep 12 15:59:42 2023 OS/Arch: linux/arm64 ``` VM started with: ``` podman machine init --cpus=2 --memory=4096 --image-path=testing --now --log-level=debug INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug DEBU[0000] Using Podman machine with `qemu` virtualization provider Extracting compressed file Image resized. Machine init complete DEBU[0019] Using Podman machine with `qemu` virtualization provider Starting machine "podman-machine-default" [/opt/homebrew/opt/podman/libexec/podman/gvproxy -listen-qemu unix:///var/folders/qh/3_60ws154z9_3yvgxb29n7z80000gn/T/podman/qmp_podman-machine-default.sock -pid-file /var/folders/qh/3_60ws154z9_3yvgxb29n7z80000gn/T/podman/podman-machine-default_proxy.pid -ssh-port 53825 -forward-sock /Users/nastacio/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman.sock -forward-dest /run/user/501/podman/podman.sock -forward-user core -forward-identity /Users/nastacio/.ssh/podman-machine-default --debug] DEBU[0019] qemu cmd: [/opt/homebrew/bin/qemu-system-aarch64 -m 4096 -smp 2 -fw_cfg name=opt/com.coreos/config,file=/Users/nastacio/.config/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default.ign -qmp unix:/var/folders/qh/3_60ws154z9_3yvgxb29n7z80000gn/T/podman/qmp_podman-machine-default.sock,server=on,wait=off -netdev socket,id=vlan,fd=3 -device virtio-net-pci,netdev=vlan,mac=5a:94:ef:e4:0c:ee -device virtio-serial -chardev socket,path=/var/folders/qh/3_60ws154z9_3yvgxb29n7z80000gn/T/podman/podman-machine-default_ready.sock,server=on,wait=off,id=apodman-machine-default_ready -device virtserialport,chardev=apodman-machine-default_ready,name=org.fedoraproject.port.0 -pidfile /var/folders/qh/3_60ws154z9_3yvgxb29n7z80000gn/T/podman/podman-machine-default_vm.pid -accel hvf -accel tcg -cpu host -M virt,highmem=on -drive file=/opt/homebrew/share/qemu/edk2-aarch64-code.fd,if=pflash,format=raw,readonly=on -drive file=/Users/nastacio/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_ovmf_vars.fd,if=pflash,format=raw -virtfs local,path=/Users,mount_tag=vol0,security_model=none -virtfs local,path=/private,mount_tag=vol1,security_model=none -virtfs local,path=/var/folders,mount_tag=vol2,security_model=none -drive if=virtio,file=/Users/nastacio/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_fedora-coreos-38.20230918.2.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2] Waiting for VM ... ``` This is the bottom of the QEMU window output waiting on a login. I could not select the entire content of the boot log: ``` podman machine inspect [ { "ConfigPath": { "Path": "/Users/nastacio/.config/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default.json" }, "ConnectionInfo": { "PodmanSocket": { "Path": "/Users/nastacio/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman.sock" }, "PodmanPipe": null }, "Created": "2023-09-28T09:42:32.018705-04:00", "Image": { "IgnitionFilePath": { "Path": "/Users/nastacio/.config/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default.ign" }, "ImageStream": "testing", "ImagePath": { "Path": "/Users/nastacio/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_fedora-coreos-38.20230918.2.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2" } }, "LastUp": "0001-01-01T00:00:00Z", "Name": "podman-machine-default", "Resources": { "CPUs": 2, "DiskSize": 100, "Memory": 4096 }, "SSHConfig": { "IdentityPath": "/Users/nastacio/.ssh/podman-machine-default", "Port": 53825, "RemoteUsername": "core" }, "State": "running", "UserModeNetworking": true } ] ```
I get the same results regardless of image-path: `stable`, `testing`, `next`.

I tried setting things up from scratch, here is what happened: ``` podman machine init --cpus 4 --memory 8096 -v "$HOME/projects:$HOME/projects" ``` This command managed to create the machine. ``` podman machine start --log-level=debug ``` During first start everything went smooth. The machine successfully started. I tried running an image: ``` podman run -p 8080:8080 -v $HOME/projects/airflow-dev/dags:/opt/airflow/dags docker.io/apache/airflow standalone ``` and this succeeded as well. Afterwards I stopped the image, stopped the machine and tried repeating the whole process. This time, when I tried starting the machine, I got the following output (`--log-level=debug` enabled, I replaced path part with `$HOME` in the output): ``` INFO[0000] podman filtering at log level debug DEBU[0000] Using Podman machine with `qemu` virtualization provider Starting machine "podman-machine-default" [/opt/homebrew/opt/podman/libexec/podman/gvproxy -listen-qemu unix:///var/folders/6k/sdcpjks958j1h489_9cbll6w0000gp/T/podman/qmp_podman-machine-default.sock -pid-file /var/folders/6k/sdcpjks958j1h489_9cbll6w0000gp/T/podman/podman-machine-default_proxy.pid -ssh-port 50459 -forward-sock $HOME/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman.sock -forward-dest /run/podman/podman.sock -forward-user root -forward-identity $HOME/.ssh/podman-machine-default --debug] DEBU[0000] qemu cmd: [/opt/homebrew/bin/qemu-system-aarch64 -m 8096 -smp 4 -fw_cfg name=opt/com.coreos/config,file=$HOME/.config/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default.ign -qmp unix:/var/folders/6k/sdcpjks958j1h489_9cbll6w0000gp/T/podman/qmp_podman-machine-default.sock,server=on,wait=off -netdev socket,id=vlan,fd=3 -device virtio-net-pci,netdev=vlan,mac=5a:94:ef:e4:0c:ee -device virtio-serial -chardev socket,path=/var/folders/6k/sdcpjks958j1h489_9cbll6w0000gp/T/podman/podman-machine-default_ready.sock,server=on,wait=off,id=apodman-machine-default_ready -device virtserialport,chardev=apodman-machine-default_ready,name=org.fedoraproject.port.0 -pidfile /var/folders/6k/sdcpjks958j1h489_9cbll6w0000gp/T/podman/podman-machine-default_vm.pid -accel hvf -accel tcg -cpu host -M virt,highmem=on -drive file=/opt/homebrew/share/qemu/edk2-aarch64-code.fd,if=pflash,format=raw,readonly=on -drive file=$HOME/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_ovmf_vars.fd,if=pflash,format=raw -virtfs local,path=$HOME/projects,mount_tag=vol0,security_model=none -drive if=virtio,file=$HOME/.local/share/containers/podman/machine/qemu/podman-machine-default_fedora-coreos-38.20230918.2.0-qemu.aarch64.qcow2] Waiting for VM ... Error: machine did not transition into running state DEBU[0029] Shutting down engines ``` QEMU log show exactly the same message that @nastacio pasted in this thread:
is anyone seeing this with podman 4.7?

@baude currently I am on:
```
Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.7.1
API Version:  4.7.1
Go Version:   go1.21.3
Git Commit:   ef83eeb9c7482826672f3efa12db3d61c88df6c4
Built:        Thu Oct  5 15:21:06 2023
OS/Arch:      darwin/arm64

Server:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.7.0
API Version:  4.7.0
Go Version:   go1.20.8
Built:        Wed Sep 27 20:24:25 2023
OS/Arch:      linux/arm64
```

and the issue is still present.

@baude Yes, I do with 4.7.1 and with previous versions I did not even had to add any mounting volumes to the init command as they were supposed to be added automatically on macos (sonoma/14.0). Apparently they are no longer added. Only note is that I see it downloading fedora-core-39 image.

I am not sure when the regression happened but it was recently (last two months). The previous image which I removed was working was about two months old.
I think Podman 4.8 will solve this problem ... RC1 was cut on Monday and we expect a release cut next week.

@baude upgraded Podman to 4.8 and tried running some containers (also recreated the machine). So far everything looks good, I was able to mount volumes and run images. Thank you for your help in this process.
